rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns residential property appraisal exemptions. Educ. Code §11.355 governs annexation of military reservation territory to school districts. The provisions are unrelated.
quote: Sec. 11.355. ANNEXATION OF ADDITIONAL TERRITORY BY CERTAIN SPECIAL-PURPOSE DISTRICTS.
_note: No conflict; rule_text addresses military reservation territory annexation, not homestead exemptions.
